entity.summary: Early altcoin-focused centralized exchange using coinedup.com, with public use visible in early 2014 and later exchange-data listings marking it inactive or untracked.
entity.notes: HEI keeps the record inactive because available references do not establish a definitive terminal date. Origin remains Unknown. An operator-introduced 2013 forum thread supports the project's identity but does not establish a legal entity or jurisdiction.

expected.notes: HEI keeps the record inactive because available references do not establish a definitive terminal date. The 2026-06-20 origin review retained Unknown because project and developer posts identify the service but do not identify a legal entity, headquarters, founding jurisdiction, or ecosystem origin.

evidence.title: Hello from CoinedUp.com
evidence.notes: Operator-introduced forum thread identifies CoinedUp.com as an exchange project and discusses planned exchange fees.
